channel.title: Teramot Documentation – Policies
channel.description: Recent content in Policies on Teramot Documentation

item.title: Access Control Policy
item.description: <iframe src="https://docs.teramot.com/files/compliance/policies/access-control-policy-bsi_EN.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 8px" title="Access Control Policy" ></iframe>
